title: Acctim Mechanical Analogue Bell Alarm Clock, Stainless-Steel, Chrome, 17 x 12 x 6 cm
features: Traditional double bell wind up alarm clock
Metal case with chrome finish, second hand alarm feet and bells
NOTE: Please read instructions supplied. We recommend to be fully wound every 24 hours for best results.
description: Product Description Acctim clocks are synonymous with style, design & quality, backed with a 1 year guarantee & supported by a friendly Customer Service teamThe Acctim collection offers an extended range of vintage design classics & the latest in contemporary style to compliment your home & officeAcctim alarm clocks combine functionality with style and include technological innovations such as Acctim Smartlite for easy night-time viewing, Radio controlled for precision timekeeping & Acctim Autoset for instant no fuss set-up.Acctim - The Clock Specialists. Manufacturer's Description The Saxon is a traditional style double bell alarm clock that needs to be wound up with a key so it does not require batteries. It boasts a loud, clear bell alarm and a separate alarm dial which makes setting your wake up call simple. Luminescent hour markers and hands make the time visible in the dark. Box Contains 1 x Large Chrome Double Bell Alarm Clock See more
